_meta.naming_note: Superseded by the Data Kiosk tables (rpt_dk_sales_traffic_by_date / _by_asin). Deliberately keeps its legacy name — not renamed to an Amazon report-type name.
_meta.description: Sales and Traffic by ASIN/SKU/marketplace/day. PENDING customer re-OAuth after Brand Analytics app re-submission — table will be empty until customers re-auth on the new app version. Sessions, page views, buy box %, units ordered, ordered product sales. Powers TACOS denominator (organic + paid total revenue) and conversion-rate analysis.
_meta.pending_reason: Sales & Traffic requires Brand Analytics scope. SellerSheet's app re-submission is pending Amazon Appstore approval. Existing customers must re-OAuth after the new app version is live before this table contains rows.

columns.comment: Ingest run tag (when the report was pulled). Use `date` for the business day.
Business day the metrics describe — the field to filter/group on for time-series analysis.
Marketplace (e.g. US, UK, DE). Defaults to '_primary_' on single-mkt stores. Always include in filters for multi-mkt stores.
Total ordered product sales (organic + paid) in the marketplace currency. TACOS denominator.
Anything Amazon ships that isn't promoted to a typed column.
